Hey everyone! I'm new here and have only been playing for a few weeks. I've really been enjoying the game so far and feel it's fairly generous for a gacha.
Are there any guides/tips on strategies and characters for English speakers? Also, how often do characters get a rerun?  I just missed 24 but really want her.

Reruns happen as soon as the previous rerun banner ends right now that's Wanda new characters don't effect that because the new banners and reruns aren't restricted by each other approximately one nrw character per month
people have been thinking that 24 rerun is next; the rerun you missed was a special short one due to an error
Mhmm
Neat. I've heard limited characters are eventually added to the standard banner. Is that after say 2-3 reruns or is it more random than that?
1 year iirc
Mhmm exactly 1 year after first release

Cool. So is there a way to look up when a character was first released? Cuz I definitely want to go for 24 but I'm also eyeing Myrhiam (I think that's how you spell her name).

Also, how often does the story get updated? I'm only just now starting chapter 4 but if I get more free time I may be able to catch up fairly quickly.
Miryam yes
Not sure chapter 8 just released
May be able to catch up unless you get stuck that is the story gets very difficult
